text.title: Regulatory Compliance 2026 Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Compliance report covers ADA + EAA but the product also serves UK or Australian users; UK Equality Act 2010 or AU DDA 1992 obligations missed; regulator complaint after launch.

root-cause.source: GTM blind-spot — author assumed US/EU coverage = global

antipattern.root-cause: Author treated the US/EU snapshot as the universe; jurisdictional inventory was not derived from GTM.
antipattern.fix: Pull active-market list from GTM / billing. Add UK-EQA, AU-DDA, JP-JIS-X-8341, CA-AODA rows whenever those markets ship. Default to inclusion; require justification to exclude.

antipattern.symptom: WCAG 2.1 AA passes axe-core but real screen-reader users cannot complete primary tasks; lawsuit filed despite green dashboard.
antipattern.root-cause: Automated tools detect 30-40% of WCAG issues; context-dependent failures (focus order, label clarity, error recovery) only show up in manual + AT-user testing.
antipattern.fix: Mandate manual screen-reader sweep per release and at-least-one AT-user session per major release. Conformance claims without that evidence are forbidden by the rule set.

antipattern.symptom: Team installs AccessiBe / UserWay banner overlay and ticks "WCAG 2.1 AA". Real users disable the overlay; lawsuit cites broken keyboard nav introduced by the overlay.

root-cause.source: Murphy v. Eyebobs 2023; multiple 2024 ADA suits

antipattern.root-cause: Overlays cannot fix structural a11y issues; they often break AT and create stronger legal evidence of negligence.
antipattern.fix: Disable any overlay before publishing the statement. Set `overlay_widgets_disabled: true` in the report. Fix issues in source code, not via DOM overlay.

antipattern.symptom: Accessibility statement on the site claims "fully WCAG 2.1 AA compliant" but no testing methodology, dated audit, or feedback channel is named. Counsel flags this as bad-faith liability.
antipattern.root-cause: Marketing wrote the statement; legal + a11y lead did not sign off; methodology + evidence were never inserted.
antipattern.fix: Require `statement_published.methodology.{automated,manual,at_user}` flags + last_updated + feedback_channels. Block publication via validator when any required field is missing.
